perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens with a wide shot of a snowy forest with tall, snow-covered pine trees against a pale sky. (2) A hand enters the frame pointing at rabbit tracks in the deep snow. (3) The camera shifts to a POV of the creator's feet wearing large black snowshoes walking through thick snow. (4) The creator is shown in a selfie-shot, wearing a white winter jacket, a black trapper hat, and glasses, smiling and talking. (5) Several people in winter gear are seen walking ahead through the forest. (6) One person in a black jacket slips and falls into the deep snow. (7) A close-up shows the technique of using the toe of the snowshoe to gain traction. (8) The camera captures a rainbow-like phenomenon in the sky behind the trees. (9) A close-up of a snow-laden bush where the creator's hand points out the gaps. (10) Final selfie-shot of the creator speaking directly to the audience.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, medium-tempo electronic background music plays throughout the video. (2) A male voice (the creator) speaks enthusiastically, identifying rabbit tracks and narrating the walk. (3) The crunching sound of snow underfoot is clearly audible during the walking segments. (4) Distant voices and laughter from other group members are heard intermittently. (5) The creator's voice becomes slightly more labored as he describes the difficulty of walking. (6) Music swells slightly during scenic transitions.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: '冰上漫步 - 日體驗' (Ice Walking - Day Experience) appears as a title. (2) Functional Text: Subtitles translate the creator's spoken words about rabbit tracks and walking techniques. (3) Decorative Text: '叫我戶外型的 Youtuber' (Call me an outdoor Youtuber) with a humorous tone. (4) Effect Text: '我們同行滑倒了' (Our companion slipped) appearing as the person falls. (5) Hook Text: '訣竅是用這個腳尖去踩' (The trick is to use this toe to step) emphasizing a tutorial point. (6) Hook Text: '大家有空一定要來試試看!' (Everyone should definitely try it if you have time!) at the end.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro/Discovery -> Group Activity -> Accident -> Instruction -> Conclusion

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main creator filming, at least 4-5 others visible walking in the group ahead.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Adult male wearing glasses, a white/beige puffer jacket, and a black winter trapper hat with ear flaps.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A dense forest completely covered in thick, white snow; trees are heavily laden with snow, and the ground is deep with fresh powder.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Natural light, bright and diffused due to overcast skies and snow reflection.
visual_scene_and_style.colorTone: Natural, dominated by white and cold blue tones.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Intro -> Pointing out tracks -> Showing the walk -> Falling incident -> Tip sharing -> Outro
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as an engaging travel vlog entry aimed at sharing the experience of snowshoeing. It combines entertainment (the slip incident) with light education (how to walk in snow) and scenic appreciation to encourage viewers to try similar outdoor winter activities.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Creator's '3c有意思tim哥' watermark and his enthusiastic, tech-vlogger-turned-outdoorsman persona.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video uses a mix of first-person perspective and direct address to create an intimate, 'with-me' travel experience.
